settings.footerText: CLASS SIX classroom portal. Built as a static frontend portfolio project.
settings.history: CLASS SIX is a compact classroom portal created to keep class information clear, friendly, and easy to update.
settings.vision: A confident, disciplined, creative class that learns with curiosity and kindness.
settings.mission: Keep learning organized, support every student, celebrate progress, and make class activities transparent.

announcements.title: Welcome to CLASS SIX
announcements.body: Welcome to the official CLASS SIX classroom portal. Use this website to check announcements, schedule, students, teachers, voting, and academic activities.

announcements.title: Bring Art Supplies on Monday
announcements.body: Please bring colored pencils, scissors, glue, and one recycled cardboard sheet for Seni Budaya activity.

announcements.title: Mathematics Practice Sheet
announcements.body: Practice sheet draft for multiplication and fraction review. Publish after teacher approval.

voting.title: Choose Next Class Activity
voting.description: Vote for the next class activity after the project exhibition.

activity.text: Portal initialized with real Class Six data.
Voting opened: Choose Next Class Activity.
